text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The challenge at the award ceremony attracted a
lot of attention, driving flocks of fans to the
Hanshin Daishoten.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian, however, is the same as ever. She
pays no mind to the crowd, instead bringing her
competitiveness up to a boil.
